name: NASAapod_get_picture
description: Get NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) for a specific date or random entries. APOD has featured a different astronomy/space image or video each day since June 16, 1995, with an expert astronomical explanation. Returns the image/video URL, HD URL, title, explanation, media type, and date. Provide a specific date to get that day's picture, or use count to get random entries. If no parameters are given, returns today's APOD. Uses the free DEMO_KEY (30 requests/hour limit).

date.description: Date of the APOD image in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2024-01-01'). Dates range from 1995-06-16 to today. Cannot be used with count or start_date/end_date.

count.description: Number of random APOD entries to return (1-100). Cannot be used with date or start_date/end_date.

start_date.description: Start date for a date range query in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be used with end_date. Cannot be used with date or count.

end_date.description: End date for a date range query in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be used with start_date. Cannot be used with date or count.

oneOf.description: APOD entry or array of entries (when using count or date range)

date.description: Date of the APOD entry in YYYY-MM-DD format

title.description: Title of the astronomy picture or video

explanation.description: Expert astronomical explanation of the image

url.description: URL of the image or video (standard resolution)

hdurl.description: URL of the high-definition image (not available for videos)

copyright.description: Copyright holder of the image (null if public domain/NASA)

name: NASAapod_search_pictures
description: Get NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) entries for a date range. Returns an array of APOD entries between start_date and end_date (inclusive), each with image/video URL, HD URL, title, expert explanation, and media type. Useful for browsing APOD archives or finding pictures from a specific time period. Uses the free DEMO_KEY (30 requests/hour limit). Maximum recommended range is about 30 days to avoid timeout.

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2024-01-01'). Must be 1995-06-16 or later.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2024-01-07'). Must be no later than today.

oneOf.description: Array of APOD entries for the specified date range

date.description: Date of the APOD entry in YYYY-MM-DD format

title.description: Title of the astronomy picture or video

explanation.description: Expert astronomical explanation of the image

url.description: URL of the image or video (standard resolution)

hdurl.description: URL of the high-definition image (not available for videos)
